## Testing

- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] `npm run health`
- [ ] Electron syntax checks if `electron/` changed
- [ ] UI smoke test if visible behavior changed

## Checklist

- [ ] No API keys, cookies, browser profile data, or local run artifacts are included
- [ ] Documentation is updated when behavior or setup changed
- [ ] Screenshots or video are attached for meaningful UI changes
